title: Flea Treatment in Hicksville, Long Island | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Hicksville, Long Island. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Free quotes. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Hicksville home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Hicksville and surrounding Long Island communities. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages, ensuring your property is flea-free and your family or customers are protected.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Hicksville residents for years with fast response times and guaranteed results. Our licensed exterminators understand the unique challenges Long Island properties face and customize treatments to eliminate fleas completely while keeping your home safe for children and pets.
localContext: Hicksville's mix of single-family homes near the LIRR station, apartment complexes along Broadway, and businesses around the Cantiague Park area all face flea challenges, especially in warmer months. Whether you're near the Mid-Island Plaza or in residential neighborhoods off Old Country Road, our local expertise ensures effective flea control tailored to Hicksville properties.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Hicksville typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees before starting any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most clients see a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, due to the flea life cycle, complete elimination typically requires 2-3 weeks and may need follow-up treatments to ensure all eggs and larvae are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry completely. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions during your service.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your flea treatment services in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Best Pest Control NYC stands behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. If fleas return within the warranty period, we'll re-treat your property at no additional cost. We also provide prevention tips to help keep your Hicksville home flea-free long-term.
